title: Built Two Unicorns in 12 Years. The Rule Has Never Changed | Glean, Arvind Jain
summary: Arvind Jain, founder of Glean (a $7 billion unicorn), discusses his philosophy for building successful companies. His approach emphasizes focus and avoiding competitive imitation over pursuing larger models or better presentations. Jain started Glean after observing his team struggle with information discovery, rejecting the strategy of building what competitors already built well.
